preconditions: a must be a mutable object
b must be a valid key for a
postconditions: the item at key b in a has been deleted
edge_cases: a is not a mutable object
b is not a valid key for a

preconditions: a must contain at least one element
b must be a valid index for a
postconditions: a will have one less element
a[b] will be removed from a
edge_cases: if b is out of range, a[b] will not be removed
